parameters:
～Nipple Nebrislime Sanctuary～ Please handle with care
as they are an endangered species. Exterminating them
is out of the question.

They will be happy if you let them suck on your
nipples. Since they are harmless to humans, just wait
patiently. They might give you an item as a souvenir
sometimes.

events.name: 初回乳首ネブリスライム

parameters:
~Nipple Neburi Slime Sanctuary~ Please handle with
care as they are an endangered species. Extermination
is strictly prohibited.

They enjoy having their nipples sucked. Since they're
harmless to humans, just wait patiently. They might
give you items as souvenirs.
What's wrong? What does that sign say?

It says the slimes around here are harmless, so we
shouldn't exterminate them.
Hmm... well, let's hurry along then.

As mother collapsed from nipple orgasms, I exchanged
handshakes with the Nipple Neburi Slime,
congratulating each other on our efforts...
But... maybe it's just me, but I feel lighter...

Thanks to the massage and moisturizing effects, Risa's
Attack increased by +3, and Max HP by +10.

Nipple orgasms lowered sanity! (This has no particular
meaning.)
